category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for managing and querying large text corpora with linguistic annotations; official CWB homepage describes the IMS Open Corpus Workbench the same way.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is The IMS Open Corpus Workbench; source_facts.name is cwb3, the packaged CWB core.
docs_sources: Official documentation page lists CWB manuals; official online manuals cover CQP and corpus encoding.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official install/core pages refer to the SourceForge repository and Subversion repository for development code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables such as cqp and cwb-encode; official homepage describes corpus querying and linguistic annotations.
